title: cmp-design-bridge per-project CONFIG root (.design-bridge/config.json)
description: Everything project-specific the CORE CLI needs. Relative paths resolve against the config dir (including render-recipe's dsRuntimeSource + framesRoot), except cmpScreenshotRoot/playwrightFrom which resolve against repoRoot (default: config dir's parent).

projectId.description: claude.ai/design canvas project UUID (the screen-frames project; DesignSync/claude_design read target).

designSystemProjectId.description: claude.ai/design PROJECT_TYPE_DESIGN_SYSTEM UUID (the component library + tokens).

repoRoot.description: Anchor for CMP-side paths. Default: the config dir's parent.

modules.description: CMP feature modules in scope. String shorthand = { id }. captureDir is repo-relative to cmpScreenshotRoot; statePrefix defaults to '<id>-'.

cmpScreenshotRoot.description: Repo path the app's subject screenshots (the self-regression baselines) live under (e.g. the Compose app dir).

captureDeriveRule.description: Template mapping stateId → subject-screenshot file. '{stateId}.png' (resolved under module.captureDir) or a full repo-relative path with {module}/{stateId}.

inventoryPath.description: Optional state-id inventory file (one id per line — the live state list) for the burndown sweep denominator.

playwrightFrom.description: OPTIONAL override: dir whose node_modules carries playwright. Playwright is the CLI's own dependency, so this is only for pointing at an existing install. Env PLAYWRIGHT_FROM overrides.

cacheDir.description: Gitignored output cache (rendered PNGs, manifests, packets).

conventions.description: conventions.md the transform leg reads (same file /design-sync uses).
